author: Srini
text: Hotfix CI Optimization — Shipped. Hotfix PRs are ~3–5x faster. Deploys are now automatically gated. Changed-file tests only (~5–10 min vs ~27 min). No ECS cluster by default. No E2E on PR (runs after merge). FE build is skipped when only BE code changed.

author: Karn Dubey
text: Deploying hotfix: PAY-6542

author: Anunaya Srivastava
text: Deploying hotfix PR: server/pull/25749 issue: APPA-2061

author: Gong
text: Call with Devil's Thumb Ranch Resort & Spa - Discovery. Why Change: significant manual work, inefficiencies from individual department purchasing, delayed invoices, compliance issues.

author: Otti
text: Technical Design Document: Claude Code as Remote MCP Server. Evaluates exposing the current Claude Code agent session as a remote MCP server.

author: Christine Radka
text: Weekly update: They had technical discovery with Jesus and their account is now built. Only missing piece is the FTP credentials for the FMS export. Project Plan Review & Account Build Review call on Tuesday.

author: Caitlin Deja
text: Account updates: Mar-a-Lago account status healthy. Moving steadily into Implementation phase. Defined clear roles for Admin Team vs Department Heads.

author: Anchal Gupta
text: Going forward lets create PRs with min functionality for easier review. Starting new Sprint tomorrow, ensure tickets in correct status. Deploying master to prod by 11am.

author: Josh Rupert
text: New Product Channel #pex-public | Partner Experience, PaaS, and Account Build Team. PEX team owns: PaaS layer, Open API (ottiapi), external-facing product experience.

author: Stockton Sheehan
text: PR server/pull/26693 - Pending approval query broken for ED accounts when Ignores unmapped Pack Sizes flag enabled. All item based invoices incorrectly filtered out, this PR fixes it.

author: Rupesh Mishra

author: Manjula Peiris
text: Security issue: Copilot allowing requests without valid bearer token, just user id and API Key. API Key exposed in FE env.json. Krishna deployed hotfix. Pampa investigating further.

author: Otti
text: DEV-1502 — Hotfix Process Optimization. Hotfix PRs were triggering oversized CI build path. 8 distinct PRs across 4 themes merged in last month.

author: Otti Staging
text: Onboarding project shipped: UI changes to prod, Error modal for export config, Angular standalone component migration completed. PEX-698 created as tech debt epic.

author: Michael MacCormack
text: Demo branching strategy for otti api: master=stable production, develop=main integration, master-demo=demo deploy branch.
